mentions.note: Housing builder leading group higher; thaw in supply/demand dynamics improving affordability and buyer interest after 2024 weakness.
Home builder needs lower interest rates to move inventory; current rate environment is headwind. Housing punches above its weight (10% of economy) but rates heading up, not down.
Home builder reported weak quarter citing high rates as primary headwind; rates too high to justify new home supply production.
Home builders well-positioned with Fed policy support. D.R. Horton earnings strong. Caller Sandy down 20% should buy more; trust management team. Toll also performing well.
